name: Rainbow Lagoon
original_name: ห้วยตึงเฒ่า
overview: The story of Kung Ten and Khao Nueng, two men who are enemies. They confront each other at Huay Tueng Thao reservoir, a popular tourist attraction in Chiang Mai, Thailand, over a girl. After this moment, they both learn what is called "friendship" and form a relationship that they will never forget.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TEASER] "RAINBOW LAGOON - ห้วยตึงเฒ่า" (ENG SUB) หนังวายเชียงใหม่ หนังภาคเหนือ [Oak & Mon]
